features.name: incomplete if statement in combinational always block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with sensitivity list containing only input signals (no clock edge) and an if statement without an else branch that assigns to a reg output

features.name: incomplete case statement in combinational always block
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with sensitivity list containing only input signals (no clock edge) and a case statement without a default branch that assigns to a reg output
